TaxCalculator.title: Tax Optimization Assistant
TaxCalculator.subtitle_tip: "No tax law knowledge needed. Just answer our questions, and the system handles the rest."
TaxCalculator.step_2_title: How much did you earn this year?
TaxCalculator.step_3_title: Do you have any savings or insurance?
TaxCalculator.step_family_desc: Personal and family info determines your base deductions.
TaxCalculator.step_income_desc: Enter salary and bonus to calculate your exact tax bracket.
TaxCalculator.step_investment_desc: SSF/RMF and insurance can significantly reduce your tax bill.
TaxCalculator.step_other_desc: Don't miss out on home loan interest and donation deductions.
TaxCalculator.ssf_tip: Super Savings Fund - Long term savings (10+ years)
TaxCalculator.rmf_tip: Retirement Mutual Fund - Savings for retirement (55+ years)
TaxCalculator.tesg_tip: Thailand ESG Fund - Special tax deduction for sustainability
TaxCalculator.annuity_tip: Life insurance focused on paying you an annuity after retirement
TaxCalculator.meta_description: Free Thai Personal Income Tax Calculator 2026. Calculate all deductions and plan your taxes online.
TaxCalculator.meta_keywords: Thai Tax Calculator 2026, Personal Income Tax Thailand, Tax Deduction Thailand, Calculate Tax Online Thailand
TaxCalculator.faq_q1: How much is the personal tax deduction in Thailand?
TaxCalculator.faq_a1: Every taxpayer is entitled to a personal allowance of 60,000 THB.
TaxCalculator.faq_q2: When is the deadline for Thai tax filing 2026?
TaxCalculator.faq_a2: The deadline is March 31, 2027, or April 8, 2027, for online filing.
TaxCalculator.ai_desc: Simulate more investment to see real-time tax reduction.

AIAdvisor.title: Personal Finance Analysis
AIAdvisor.subtitle: Local Processing ({count} saved plans)
AIAdvisor.waiting: Waiting for your first plan... AI will start immediately
AIAdvisor.privacy: All data processed on your browser only
AIAdvisor.insight_debt_warning: You have total debt of {amount}. Consider increasing extra payments to reduce interest burden.
AIAdvisor.insight_debt_good: Your total tracked debt is {amount}. The debt structure looks healthy.
AIAdvisor.insight_savings_low: You haven't started a retirement plan yet. We recommend starting as soon as possible — even a small monthly amount grows significantly over time.
AIAdvisor.insight_tax_refund: You may receive a tax refund of approximately {amount}. Consider investing the refund amount into SSF/RMF to further optimize next year's tax.
AIAdvisor.insight_investment: You have {amount} in tracked investments. Consider diversifying across asset classes for better risk-adjusted returns.
AIAdvisor.insight_refinance: Your loan has a potential rate jump detected. We recommend preparing a refinance plan 1-2 months in advance.
AIAdvisor.insight_emergency: You activated the income shock stress test. We strongly recommend building an emergency fund of 6 months' living expenses.

FinancialIntelligence.debt_strategy_msg: You have a high-interest debt at {rate}%. Bank deposits yield only 1-2%. Reallocating some savings to pay off this debt yields a guaranteed return far higher than keeping cash idle.
FinancialIntelligence.tax_opp_msg: Your marginal tax bracket is {rate}%. Investing a little more in tax-deductible funds will turn the tax money you would have thrown away into savings for your own future.
FinancialIntelligence.invest_warn_msg: You hold debt with an interest rate higher than your investment returns. The smartest move is to temporarily pause investments and use that money to pay off the debt, as debt repayment is a guaranteed return.
FinancialIntelligence.refinance_msg: You are approaching the 3-year mark or the interest rate is about to spike. Applying for a refinance or retention now can save you hundreds of thousands.
FinancialIntelligence.emergency_msg: Long-term debt carries high risk if you suddenly lose income. You should maintain an emergency fund of at least 6 months of expenses to protect your credit.
FinancialIntelligence.default_msg: Try calculating your tax or loan! Our AI will immediately begin analyzing your financial strength.
